definition: an inspiration is someone or something that gives you ideas on how to do something
example: His wife was the inspiration for the main character in the book.

definition: if you predict something, you say that it will happen some time in the future
example: It’s difficult to predict which team will win in tomorrow’s game.

definition: a straw is a tube made of plastic or paper that you use to drink something
example: Jacky drank his milkshake through a straw.

definition: an invention is something new that is designed or created for the first time
example: The invention of the internet changed the way people connected around the world.

definition: an inventor is a person who thinks of new things to design or make that no one else has done before
example: The machine is named after its inventor.

definition: if you wipe something, you clean it or dry it by using a cloth on it
example: Please wipe the board clean so that I can write on it.

definition: a windshield wiper is part of a car that moves with water across the glass on the front shield to clean it
example: When it started raining, Naïm turned on the windshield wipers so he could see clearly.

definition: a material is cloth used to make clothes, curtains, and similar things
example: The material of Janez’s dress has red and blue lines.

definition: an adhesive is something that is sticky and can join things together
example: The sheets are glued together with strong adhesive.

definition: if you erase something, you wipe or rub away marks on it to clean it
example: Make light pencil lines so that you can erase them easily.

definition: when two things are apart, there is a distance or period of time between them
example: The house stands apart from the village.

definition: a wheelchair is a special chair, usually with two wheels on it, that someone who cannot walk uses to move around
example: Ruseya struggles to walk, so she uses a wheelchair to move around.

definition: something that is covered in something has a layer of something else on top of it
example: After playing outside, Ilyan’s clothes were covered in dirt.

definition: equipment is the tools or things you need for a specific task or reason, like for playing a sport
example: We need to hire the right equipment for the job.

definition: a protective vest is a special piece of clothing police officers wear over their chest to keep them safe
example: Police and security officers wear protective vests as part of their uniform in some countries.

definition: a blind person is not able to see anything with their eyes
example: Augustin’s grandmother is blind, so she can’t see anymore.

definition: a visually impaired person cannot see well or clearly with their eyes
example: The visually impaired student listens to his notes.

definition: something that is raised is slightly higher than the things around it
example: The stage was raised so that it was higher than the rest of the hall.

definition: an industry is a type of business
example: The IT industry keeps growing bigger every year.

definition: a spaceship is a type of vehicle that transports people to the moon or other planets
example: The spaceship blasted off into space.

definition: a trash collector is a person whose job is to collect the trash from outside buildings and houses
example: The trash collectors empty our garbage cans every Friday.

definition: a garbage can is something that you use to hold the things you don’t want any more
example: Put the empty box in the garbage can.

definition: something that is alongside something else is next to it
example: The children lined up alongside the teacher before going into class.

definition: a triathlon is a sports competition that includes running, swimming, and cycling in one race
example: Denny is training for a triathlon; swimming is his worst event.

definition: if you volunteer to do something, you do it without being asked or being paid to do it
example: Léon wants to volunteer to work with Doctors without Borders.

definition: elision is when you join two words or leave out some of the sounds of a word when saying it
example: Saying “gonna” instead of “going to” is an example of elision.

definition: when you reuse something, you use it again or more than once
example: You can reuse plastic bags several times.

definition: your values are the things in life that you feel and think are important
example: Maria and her family have many shared values.

definition: support is the help and encouragement you give to someone else when things are difficult for them
example: Many people showed their support for the sports team despite their loss.

definition: if an activity involves something else, that thing is a necessary part of it
example: The job involves a lot of international travel.

definition: a benefit is something that helps you or gives you an advantage in something
example: Some jobs include benefits like health insurance and pension plans.

definition: if you value someone or something, you think it is important
example: Arkhina values living so close to her family and friends.

definition: kayaking is a sport you do alone or with another person in a long boat, with pointed ends
example: The company offers kayaking and river trips.

definition: a role model is a person whose behavior you try to copy because you admire them
example: Brando’s a good role model for everybody in the company.

definition: if you respect someone, you admire them because of the things they know or how they behave
example: Henri respects Andrej for his hard work.

definition: something that rises gets higher and moves upward
example: When water boils, bubbles rise to the surface.

definition: if someone’s behavior is genuine, it seems very real and true
example: When Valentin speaks, you can hear the genuine joy and happiness in her voice.

definition: a crisis is an event that is very bad, difficult, and dangerous
example: The government handled the water crisis very well.

definition: when you are delighted with something, you are very happy and excited with it
example: Meg was delighted to be invited to Maryam’s party.
